/opt/android-ndk/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang++ --target=armv7-none-linux-androideabi35 --sysroot=/opt/android-ndk/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -march=armv7-a -mthumb -Wformat -Werror=format-security   -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -Wl,--strip-all -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flagsecure.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libflagsecure.so -o libflagsecure.so CMakeFiles/flagsecure.dir/zygisk/src/main.cpp.o  -landroid -llog -latomic -lm
